title: KLA (KLAC) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: KLA (KLAC) came out with quarterly earnings of $5.40 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $4.82 per share. This compares to earnings of $5.81 per share a year ago.

title: KLA Corp. stock adds to regular-session rally on earnings beat, outlook
text: KLA Corp. shares added to regular-session gains after hours Thursday as the chip-equipment maker's outlook and results topped Wall Street expectations.

title: KLA Corporation Reports Fiscal 2023 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
text: For the quarter, total revenues were $2.355 billion, above the mid-point of guidance range of $2.125 to $2.375 billion; For the quarter, GAAP diluted EPS attributable to KLA was $4.97 and non-GAAP diluted EPS attributable to KLA was $5.40, each finishing above the mid-point of guidance ranges; Cash flow from operating activities for the quarter and fiscal year was $959.1 million and $3.67 billion, respectively, and free cash flow was $880.4 million and $3.33 billion, respectively; and Capital returns for the quarter and fiscal year were $568.3 million and $2.04 billion, respectively. MILPITAS, Calif.
